tags.name: mc-text-and-icon
tags.description:
Attributes:

  * `ariarole` {`AriaRoles | undefined`} - 

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the component.

  * `icon` {`string`} - Name of the icon

  * `trailingicon` {`string`} - Name of the trailing icon

  * `label` {`string`} - Can be passed as a property or as a slot.

  * `sublabel` {`string`} - Can be passed as a property or as a slot.

  * `hiddenlabel` {`boolean`} - If set to true or the attribute is just presented without any value,
then the label will not appear, but will be used as `aria-label` only.

  * `disablediconslot` {`boolean`} - If set to true or the attribute is just presented without any value,
then the icon slots will not be rendered in to the DOM.

  * `disabledlabelslot` {`boolean`} - If set to true or the attribute is just presented without any value,
then the label slot will not be rendered in to the DOM.

Properties:

  * `fitToIconSize` {`FitToIconSize`} - 

  * `ariarole` {`AriaRoles | undefined`} - 

  * `hasLabelSlot` {`boolean`} - 

  * `hasLabelLinkSlot` {`boolean`} - 

  * `hasLeadingIconSlot` {`boolean`} - 

  * `hasTrailingIconSlot` {`boolean`} - 

  * `badgeCssClasses` - 

  * `labelSlotElements` {`HTMLElement[]`} - 

  * `leadingIconSlotElements` {`HTMLElement[]`} - 

  * `trailingIconSlotElements` {`HTMLElement[]`} - 

  * `badgeSlotElements` {`HTMLElement[]`} - 

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the component.

  * `icon` {`string`} - Name of the icon

  * `trailingicon` {`string`} - Name of the trailing icon

  * `label` {`string`} - Can be passed as a property or as a slot.

  * `sublabel` {`string`} - Can be passed as a property or as a slot.

  * `hiddenlabel` {`boolean`} - If set to true or the attribute is just presented without any value,
then the label will not appear, but will be used as `aria-label` only.

  * `disablediconslot` {`boolean`} - If set to true or the attribute is just presented without any value,
then the icon slots will not be rendered in to the DOM.

  * `disabledlabelslot` {`boolean`} - If set to true or the attribute is just presented without any value,
then the label slot will not be rendered in to the DOM.
